title: Next button
scenario: Onboarding wizard Next button advances through all six screens correctly
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or clear app data to reset onboarding).
4. Verify the app advances to the second onboarding screen (Step 2).
6. Verify the app advances to the third onboarding screen (Step 3).
8. Verify the app advances to the fourth onboarding screen (Step 4).
10. Verify the app advances to the fifth onboarding screen (Step 5).
12. Verify the app advances to the sixth (final) onboarding screen (Step 6).
expected: Tapping 'Next' on each onboarding screen advances to the subsequent screen in sequence, ending at the sixth (final) screen.
